'''Wumdi''' was an [[Etti]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] during [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] reign.

==History==
In the past the [[Pike Sisters]] worked for Wumdi as [[assassin/Legends|assassins]], until they changed their name and became freelancer [[mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].<ref name="SEE3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

Wumdi was present in the Black Sun meeting of [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] where [[Guri]] killed [[Green]], as a message to any Vigos who would try to sell information.<ref name="Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire novel">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>

After Xizor's death in the [[Battle over Coruscant]], Wumdi was present in a Vigo council about the future of Black Sun. He and [[Clezo]] expressed their distate when [[Lonay]] behaved as he was the head of the council, and he refused to take orders from a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]; he seemed to like a mysterious attractive [[human/Legends|human]] woman, and reminisced of the Pike sisters.<ref name="SEE3" />

During a later meeting, the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] showed up after the human female's invitation. Then the room was invaded by thugs, who were quickly slaughtered. The human female identified the bodies as [[Vekker (Quarren)|Vekker's]] soldiers; nobody knew that the mysterious human who was actually [[Savan]] in disguise, and the one responsible for the attack to incriminate Vekker. Savan claimed that Clezo's and Wumdi's troops would soon be after Vekker.<ref name="SEE3" />
{{Char-stub}}
